chunks.text: ley Resources The primary resources for this course are the lecture slides and homework assignments on the front page . Previous Offerings A full version of this course was offered in Fall 2018 , Fall 2017 and Spring 2017 . Lecture videos from Fall 2

2017 and Spring 2017 . Lecture videos from Fall 2018 are available here ; those from Fall 2017, here ; those from Spring 2017, here . An abbreviated version of this course was offered in Fall 2015 . Courses Geoff Hinton on Coursera Andrew Ng on Cour
